basic_details.job_title: NTPC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Executive and Executive Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) has published the Senior Executive and Executive Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 positions across these posts. Candidates within the age limits of 50 to 55 years, depending on the post, and holding a Degree in Engineering (MBA is an added advantage) with the required experience as per post specifications are eligible to apply online at the official NTPC website. The application process will be active until 26 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and online application link below.

age_limit.age_details: Posts A&B: 55 Years, Posts C&D: 50 Years
age_limit.details: Senior Executive (Material & Supply Chain Management): Maximum Age 55 Years Senior Executive (Green Chemical): Maximum Age 55 Years Executive (Regulatory Affairs-Nuclear): Maximum Age 50 Years Executive (Engineering-Nuclear): Maximum Age 50 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering, MBA is added advantage. Specific experience required for each post.
qualification.details: Senior Executive (Material & Supply Chain Management): Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. MBA (added advantage). Minimum 22 years post qualification executive experience including 15 years' experience in Material Management/ Supply Chain Management. Out of 22 years post qualification executive experience, minimum 10 years' experience should be in Power/Energy sector. Candidate having global exposure will be preferred. Senior Executive (Green Chemical): Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. Minimum 22 years post qualification executive experience out of which minimum 15 years' experience in design and development, project planning and execution of ammonia and/or methanol plants/other Green Chemical Projects or related areas. Executive (Regulatory Affairs-Nuclear): Degree in Engineering from a recognized University. MBA (added advantage). Minimum 15 years of post-qualification executive experience (including training period, if any) in nuclear power projects, out of which minimum 10 years of experience should be in regulatory bodies, preparation of regulatory documents, Coordination with AERB, replying to regulatory queries, obtaining regulatory clearances for Nuclear Power Projects etc. Executive (Engineering-Nuclear): Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University. MBA (added advantage). Minimum 15 years of post-qualification executive experience (including training period, if any) in Civil engineering of nuclear power projects, out of which minimum 10 years of experience should be in Civil engineering of nuclear island.

selection_process: Application shortlisting/screening Written/computer-based test Personal interview Combination of the above
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NTPC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NTPC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NTPC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NTPC Senior Executive and Executive posts is 26-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for NTPC Executive posts?
faq.answer: For Executive posts, a Degree in Engineering from a recognized University is required. An MBA is considered an added advantage for certain roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for Senior Executive posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Executive posts (Posts A&B) is 55 years. For Executive posts (Posts C&D), it is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in NTPC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Senior Executive and Executive posts released by NTPC Limited in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NTPC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/EWS/OBC categories. SC/ST/PwBD/XSM/Female candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Senior Executive posts?
faq.answer: Senior Executive posts (A&B) offer a salary of Rs. 1,90,000/- per month, along with accommodation/HRA, retention benefit, and medical facility.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NTPC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves application shortlisting/screening, followed by a written/computer-based test and a personal interview, or a combination of these methods.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from any state apply for these NTPC posts?
faq.answer: Yes, the job location is Across India, and the head office is in New Delhi, indicating that candidates from all states are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q9. Is the NTPC recruitment on a permanent or contract basis?
faq.answer: The job type mentioned for this recruitment is 'Contract', indicating that these positions are offered on a fixed-term basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NTPC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly.
